zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Charlton於1345年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴時，他的父親Alan de Charlton27歲，母親Margery FitzAer31歲。他於大約1370年與Mrs. Thomas Charleton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年10月6日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Charlton于1345年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴时，他的父亲Alan de Charlton27岁，母亲Margery FitzAer31岁。他于大约1370年与Mrs. Thomas Charleton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年10月6日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Charlton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

variants.name: Carlton
meanings: English (northern and eastern England): habitational name from any of various places called Carlton (Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Durham, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, East Yorkshire, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire) or Carleton (Cumberland, Lancashire, Norfolk, Yorkshire). All come from Old Norse karl ‘common man, peasant’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Charlton ). Places spelled Carl(e)ton (as opposed to Charlton) are in areas of Scandinavian settlement, mostly in northern England.

variants.name: Carlin
meanings: Irish (North Ulster; now also common in Scotland): from Ó Cearbhalláin ‘descendant of Cearbhallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Cearbhall (see Carroll ).
Italian (Veneto): from a pet form of the personal name Carlo, Italian form of Charles .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Charlton was born in 1345, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alan de Charlton, was 27 and his mother, Margery FitzAer, was 31. He married Mrs. Thomas Charleton about 1370, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 6 October 1387, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Charlton est né en 1345, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alan de Charlton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery FitzAer, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Thomas Charleton environ 1370, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1387, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Charlton 1345 in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Charlton 27 und seine Mutter Margery FitzAer 31. Er hat um 1370 in England, United Kingdom Mrs. Thomas Charleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1387 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Charlton è nato il nel 1345 nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alan de Charlton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery FitzAer, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Thomas Charleton circa 1370, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 ottobre 1387, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Charltonが1345年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで生まれた時，父Alan de Charltonは27歳，母Margery FitzAerは31歳であった。約1370年にイギリスイギリスでMrs. Thomas Charletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年10月6日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Charlton(이)가 1345년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Charlton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery FitzAer(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mrs. Thomas Charleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 10월 6일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Charlton nasceu em 1345, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alan de Charlton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery FitzAer, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Thomas Charleton aproximadamente 1370, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1387, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Charlton родился в 1345 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alan de Charlton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery FitzAer, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Thomas Charleton около 1370 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 октября 1387 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Charlton nació en 1345, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Alan de Charlton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery FitzAer, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mrs. Thomas Charleton aproximadamente 1370, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1387, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
